channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead tree, 2nd May
item.description:
Still dead from last summer!.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Witham Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped sofa and wood, 2nd May
item.description:
Flytipped sofa and wood

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 112, Lansdowne Way, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paving flypost on wooden pallet, 2nd May
item.description:
Paving company flypost eventually removed on Wednesday after a month On Friday they returned with a bigger one
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northumberland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 2nd May
item.description:
Rubbish not in bin - opened by foxes

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Range of flytipping corner of Windus and Margaret Road, 2nd May
item.description:
Issue been present a few days - corner of Margaret and Windus Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windus Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 2nd May
item.description:
Outside 15-23a Graces Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Graces Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped van full of rubbish, 2nd May
item.description:
2 months + this has been here more rubbish adding to it all the time disabled access completely blocked residents forced to walk on the highway which is very busy with 30 tonnes + trucks accessing Bromley council green waste plant at speed totally unacceptable will you wait for a fatality to clear this mess ?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Old Maidstone Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thames Water works appear to have been abandoned, 2nd May
item.description:
Thames Water have blocked Church Street, and blocked one pavement unnecessarily. There is no sign of activity all day today and hasn't been for days. There is no sense of urgency about the disruption they are causing to buses, people, bikes and traffic. Ca
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish strewn across path, 2nd May
item.description:
Continuously repeating issue of piles of rubbish outside flat 4, Aden Lodge. 3rd report in as many months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Aden Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of junction, 2nd May
item.description:
Domestic waste
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hertford Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant rubish in this area, 2nd May
item.description:
Constant rubish in this area. Even after your cleaning days it still has a lot of rubish. On top of that there are people drinking all the time in front of the alcohol shop and leaving rubish after themselves

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Leila Parnell Place, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: O/s 101 Brondesbury villas by wall, 2nd May
item.description:
Fly tipping with the name and address clear of the Resident and reported this morning

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Fly tipping, 2nd May
item.description:
Flight tipping household waste household furniture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Pantiles, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in Franks park, path off Glendale Rd entrance, 2nd May
item.description:
4 bing bags, paper and orange plastic fence dumped in Park along park. please can these be picked up asap to deter more fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glendale Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Soiled nappies dumped in green (hazardous waste), 2nd May
item.description:
There is an ongoing problem which I have reported to the council of someone dumping soiled nappies in the middle of the green. I’ve reported it to the council again but please could it be cleared up in the meantime especially in this hot weather! Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sedgmoor Place, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas cylinders dumped, 2nd May
item.description:
This is typical behaviour on a Friday night in Freta Road. Often cylinders are dumped at the top of the road obscured either by walls or fences
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Freta Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposter, 2nd May
item.description:
Political flyposter needs removing from bollard at end of Gravel Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakley Road, Keston Mark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deop down curb needed, parking restrictions needed, 2nd May
item.description:
There's a serious issue here regarding lack of drop down curb and cars parking outside the Spong Kitchen cafe, cars parking up on pavement, blocking wheelchair. Pushing elderly and frail person in wheelchair to access shops and footpath is difficult. Please could someone contact me by phone or email I would be grateful to discuss and give my ideas about what is needed. I have previously send photos but you keep closing the ticket.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stone Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish been hear since Friday, 2nd May
item.description:
Surely we’re intilted to a regular litter pick the people that live in old Ivanhoe pub se5 8dh are absolutely filthy surely Southwark should get in contact with owners of property

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Ivanhoe Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping next to bin, 2nd May
item.description:
Rubbish is regularly fly tipped by this bin from people who have rented the church spaces. They are not allowed to dispose of their rubbish in the church bins so they fly tip it here. It then sits here all weekend attracting vermin.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northchurch Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
